title: syntherisma filiformis
side_effects: Syntherisma filiformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in individuals who consume it in excess. Prolonged exposure to its extracts has been linked to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and in severe cases, respiratory problems. Furthermore, improper use of the plant's extracts can also lead to interactions with other medications, resulting in adverse effects on the cardiovascular and nervous systems. In rare instances, excessive consumption of Syntherisma filiformis can cause liver damage and other serious health complications.
